summary: Full end-to-end test pass for QDROPAQ backend (/api/, /api/intake, /api/primer-leads) and frontend (Home, Getting Started, About, Fees & Forms, Cookie consent, Primer lead-magnet). All 8 backend pytest cases and all 12 Playwright UI/integration checks passed. New endpoints persist correctly to Mongo collections `intakes` and `primer_leads`; primer-leads de-dup by email returns the same id on repeat submissions. Per-route document titles update correctly. Cookie consent banner shows on first visit, hides on accept, persists to localStorage (qdropaq.cookieConsent='accepted'), and does NOT reappear on reload.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: POST /api/primer-leads returns HTTP 201 even when no new row is created (de-dup hit). Functionally fine and tests assert this, but strict REST would return 200 on the dedup branch. Not a bug, just a polish item.

Minor: GettingStarted form keeps `type=email` on the email input, so the browser's HTML5 validation can block submission of malformed emails before the backend 422 path is exercised. UI test had to relax `type` to verify the intake-error path; real users will see the browser tooltip instead of intake-error for the 'not-an-email' case. Consider switching to type='text' + Pydantic-only validation, or accept that the browser layer guards this case.
Minor: CookieConsent useEffect dependency `[setOpen]` is effectively static; could be `[]`. Not a defect.

Note: backend/.env CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Currently the frontend does not send credentials, so this is latent — flag for future tightening to an explicit origin list.
seed_data_creation: Sample TEST_-prefixed rows were created in MongoDB collections `intakes` and `primer_leads` (collection: test_database). Expected and acceptable per the request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_qdropaq_api.py covers /api/, /api/intake (valid full, minimal, invalid email 422, missing name 422), and /api/primer-leads (valid 201 + Mongo persistence, idempotent dedup same id, invalid email 422). Frontend Playwright run hits Home (page-home, hero h1, primer-form), Cookie banner (show → accept → persist on reload), per-route document.title on /about and /fees-and-forms, GettingStarted intake-form including the invalid-email path (note: must strip type='email' to bypass HTML5 validation). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is https://qdropaq-established.preview.emergentagent.com.
